item.title: Cardiology Conference (ACC) & Industry
item.description:
• The American College of Cardiology (ACC) annual conference serves as a major nexus for the latest science and industry activity in cardiovascular disease. The meeting highlights new clinical data for drugs across therapeutic areas like heart failure, atherosclerosis, and hypertension. It also underscores the industry's focus on prevention strategies, digital health tools for patient management, and the competitive landscape as companies showcase their pipelines and engage with key opinion leaders.
  • N/A
  • STAT News
